description:
Process the three most recent emails in your Inbox. For each email, send a reply using the template provided, replacing '[Name]' with the sender's name and '[ID]' with a unique random 4-digit number. Move the original emails to a folder named 'Tickets-Created'.

Template:
Dear [Name],

This is an automated acknowledgment of your message. A support representative will review your inquiry shortly.

Reference Ticket ID: [ID]

Thank you,
Support Team
